93 _39AD EATG_DSCHRG_CD (39Ad) Self-Care: Eating: Discharge CHAR 2 A score indicating the patient's ability to eat at discharge. Eating includes the ability to use suitable utensils to bring food to the mouth, as well as the ability to chew and swallow the food once the meal is presented in the customary manner on a
